headline: Director of Pastoral Care at Bluff City Medical Center | Chaplaincy Supervisor
Rev. | Board Certified Chaplain at Golden Heart Medical Center | Clergy Peer
Station Manager at WGSP 1490 AM | Community Radio | Memphis
Nursing Professor at Bluff City Community College | Community Health Advocate
Senior Pastor at Grace Community Church Memphis | Community Leader
Head Deacon at Grace Community Church | Congregational Care & Health Ministries
Social Worker at Memphis Youth Services | Advocate for Youth & Families
Educator at Jackson City Schools | Faith-Community Volunteer
Junior at Crescent City University | Communications & Sports Broadcasting
Registered Dietitian & Nutritionist | Diabetes Wellness Specialist | Memphis
MD | Primary Care Physician at Midtown Family Practice | Memphis
Director of Clinical Pastoral Education at Regional One Health | CPE Supervisor
Board Certified Chaplain | Hospice & Palliative Care | APC Member
Staff Chaplain | Oncology Unit | APC Board Member
Radio Host & Podcast Producer | Faith & Community Programming | WMQM Memphis
Adjunct Faculty at Memphis Divinity School | Pastoral Theology | Hospital Chaplaincy
Community Health Coordinator | Bluff City Medical Center | Wellness Programs
Sat with a family in the ICU at 3 AM, made the air a little lighter.
Morning Reflections live from the Beale Street studio this week.
Friday groceries and dinner at Mom's in South Memphis.
Greenline walk with worship music, two to three miles.
Sunday dinner ministry — pot roast, mac and cheese, peach cobbler.
Morning pages before dawn, coffee steam in the dark kitchen.
Booked next week's radio guest — a Memphis musician for the devotional.
Palliative-care debrief with the team, then the ethics committee.
Brenda's voice on the phone every evening, the anchor.
Garden in the fading light — zinnias, lavender, the bird feeders.
CPE hours at 28 of 50, mentoring the two residents.
Naomi checked in twice this week, my old soul.
Chamomile on the porch swing with Mercy at dusk.
Withings weigh-in, down twelve; Dexcom steady, A1C at 6.4.
Playlist curated for the show — Lauren Daigle and the Gettys.
Health-fair planning with Deacon Mosley at Grace Community.
Therapy with Dr. Whitfield — compassion fatigue and boundaries.
Marcus called about the broadcasting internship, so proud.
Saturday yoga video before the live broadcast.
Tithe to Grace Community before I budget anything else.
Cafe Eclectic brunch with Sandra, our tradition.
Sponsor check-in with Covenant Insurance and Mitchell's Flowers.
Oura readiness low today — honored it and slowed down.
Interfaith event with Rev. Dawson, the clergy network.
